name: Smoky Peach or Apricot Baste
recipeInstructions:
If you use peaches for this baste, try a dash of allspice to bring out the peach flavor. Try the baste first on chicken, but you may also like it on pork or lamb.
Puree fruits. Combine with remaining ingredients. Simmer 10 to 15 minutes. Makes about 1 1/2 cups.
Note: If using over wood coals, liquid smoke is not necessary. If using over Lazy-Q (Gas), adding some liquid smoke will enhance the flavor.
